welcome.content: 👋 Welcome. This questionnaire invites you, as a parent or carer, to provide a holistic overview of your child, including their learning profile alongside their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language, and sensory needs. Your responses will help build a rounded picture to inform the assessment.

background_1.question: Why are you seeking an assessment for {student_name} at this time? Please outline your three main concerns.

background_2.question: Which of the following areas are of concern for {student_name}? (Please tick all that apply.)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: Do you require this report for a specific purpose?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Has anyone (for example, the school, a GP or a family member) suggested a possible diagnosis for {student_name}?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who lives at home with {student_name} during term-time?
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Have there been any significant life events affecting {student_name} in the last 18 months?
family_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_3.question: Is there any family history of the following? (Please tick all that apply.)
family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Which languages are spoken in {student_name}'s home?
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.question: Was {student_name} born at full term?
dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.question: Did {student_name} achieve their early developmental milestones at the expected times?
dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_3.question: Has {student_name} received any Speech and Language Therapy (SaLT), Occupational Therapy (OT) or Behavioural Optometry?
dev_milestones_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.question: Which is {student_name}'s dominant hand?
dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_5.question: Does {student_name} have any sensory sensitivities (for example, to food, sound or texture)?
dev_milestones_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_1.question: Does {student_name} take any regular medication?
health_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s sleep, particularly around exam periods?
health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Has {student_name}'s vision been assessed recently?
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: Has {student_name} changed schools at any point?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: If so, please explain the reasons for the move(s).

education_3.question: Have there been any periods of absence from school, or difficulties with {student_name} attending school?
education_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_4.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_5.question: Has {student_name} ever been excluded, or placed on a reduced timetable?
education_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_6.question: If so, please provide further detail.

education_7.question: Has {student_name} experienced significant disruption to their education (for example, the COVID years, illness, or frequent moves)?
education_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_8.question: Has {student_name} previously had any EP, SpLD, SaLT or OT assessments?
education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: Does {student_name} have any existing diagnoses? (Please tick all that apply.)
education_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_10.question: What is {student_name}'s current SEND register status (for example, an EHCP or IEP)?
education_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_11.question: What are {student_name}'s plans for sixth-form, college or an apprenticeship?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: In which subjects does {student_name} perform best?

education_13.question: Which subjects does {student_name} find most challenging?

education_14.question: Are there any subject drops or changes planned for {student_name} before the exams?
education_14.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_1.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s reading speed compared with their peers?
literacy_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_2.question: Does {student_name} enjoy reading for pleasure?
literacy_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_3.question: Do you have any concerns about {student_name}'s spelling?
literacy_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_4.question: Do you have any concerns about the legibility or speed of {student_name}'s handwriting under pressure?
literacy_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_5.question: Do you have any concerns about {student_name}'s numeracy or mental arithmetic?
literacy_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_6.question: Does {student_name} find timed work harder than untimed work?
literacy_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_7.question: Does {student_name} find it difficult to follow multi-step verbal instructions?
literacy_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_8.question: Does {student_name} tend to forget things they have just been told, or lose track while reading?
literacy_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_9.question: Do you have any concerns about {student_name}'s attention, daydreaming, punctuality or organisation?
literacy_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_10.question: If {student_name} has an existing ADHD/ADD diagnosis, are they currently taking medication for it?
literacy_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_15.question: How did {student_name}'s mock exam grades compare with their predicted grades?
education_15.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_16.question: Does {student_name} perform better in coursework than in timed exams?
education_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_17.question: Has {student_name} ever run out of time in an exam sat under standard conditions?
education_17.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_18.question: Does {student_name} currently have any access arrangements in place? (Please tick all that apply.)
education_18.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_19.question: If any arrangements are in place, how long have they been {student_name}'s normal way of working?
education_19.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_20.question: Are you requesting any new or additional arrangements for {student_name}?
education_20.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_21.question: How competent a typist is {student_name}?
education_21.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_22.question: Which exam centre will hold accountability for {student_name}'s access arrangement application?
education_22.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_23.question: Does {student_name} complete homework independently?
education_23.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I - Functional Impact at GCSE

education_24.question: Does {student_name} submit coursework pieces on time?
education_24.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I - Functional Impact at GCSE

education_25.question: How would you describe {student_name}'s approach to revision?
education_25.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I - Functional Impact at GCSE

education_26.question: Does {student_name} ask for help when they are stuck?
education_26.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I - Functional Impact at GCSE

education_27.question: Thinking about the mock exams, how did {student_name} cope on the day?

options.label: Did not attend / could not complete

education_27.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I - Functional Impact at GCSE

emotional_1.question: Does {student_name} experience physical symptoms of exam anxiety (for example, nausea, palpitations or a sense of dread)?
emotional_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_2.question: How is {student_name}'s sleep around exam periods?
emotional_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_3.question: Does {student_name} tend towards perfectionism, setting unrealistic standards or being reluctant to submit work?
emotional_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_4.question: Does comparing themselves with peers affect {student_name}'s mood or self-esteem?
emotional_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_5.question: Has {student_name} had any current or past involvement with CAMHS, private therapy or school counselling?
emotional_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

emotional_6.question: Are there any current concerns regarding {student_name}'s low mood, self-harm or reluctance to attend school?
emotional_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_5.question: How would you describe your family's awareness of the GCSE/JCQ rules and the school's access-arrangement process?
family_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_6.question: Have you met with the SENCo this academic year?
family_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_7.question: Does {student_name} currently receive any tutoring (whether subject-based or study-skills)?
family_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_8.question: Does {student_name} have a quiet, dedicated study space at home?
family_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

strengths_1.question: What does {student_name} most enjoy doing outside of school?

strengths_2.question: What are {student_name}'s strengths, as you see them?

strengths_3.question: After their GCSEs, what would {student_name} like to do?

options.label: Stay at this school for sixth form
Move to a different sixth form / college

strengths_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

closing_1.question: Is there anything else you would like the psychologist to know about {student_name}?

closing_2.question: Who should receive a copy of this report by email?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
